title: School or work absence note
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports recording that an issued sick-leave certificate or related medical report is being submitted for employer-facing attestation and distinguishes sick leave, companion leave and medical reports without establishing clinical incapacity.
assessment.rationale: Relevant only to documenting the administrative document type and intended attestation context; it cannot certify illness or attendance limitation.

source.title: Attestation of Medical Leaves and Reports
source.jurisdiction: United Arab Emirates federal service, with competent-emirate authority qualifications
source.population: Patients of all ages submitting a medical leave, companion leave, or medical report for attestation.
source.setting: Administrative attestation of documents issued by licensed UAE health facilities or appropriately certified foreign institutions; not a clinical assessment standard.
source.exclusions: Exact for document type, licensed-facility, attestation, duration-band and medical-committee requirements. It does not define clinical incapacity, fitness, diagnosis disclosure, assessment content, dates, duration, backdating, or school-note requirements.

exact_location.heading: About this service; required documents; target audience
exact_location.locator: official service page sections “About this service”, “Required documents”, and “Target audience”

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording that an issued sick-leave certificate or related medical report is being submitted for employer-facing attestation and distinguishes sick leave, companion leave and medical reports without establishing clinical incapacity.

assessment.text: Supports licensed-facility, competent-authority, issuance-to-attestation interval, duration-band and medical-committee approval context; it does not authorize automatic certification, backdating, duration selection, or diagnosis disclosure.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded UAE facility, authority and approval context without selecting dates, duration or content.
